verses.text: God bids them take Ai, this time keeping the spoil. Take Ai. God gives a second chance.
God bids them take Ai, this time keeping the spoil. Take Ai. God gives a second chance.
Joshua chooses thirty thousand for an ambush. The plan. A stratagem is laid.
Joshua chooses thirty thousand for an ambush. The plan. A stratagem is laid.
Joshua chooses thirty thousand for an ambush. The plan. A stratagem is laid.
They are to draw the men out, then take the city. The lure. The trap is prepared.
They are to draw the men out, then take the city. The lure. The trap is prepared.
They are to draw the men out, then take the city. The lure. The trap is prepared.
The men lie in wait while Joshua camps before the city. In wait. All is positioned.
The men lie in wait while Joshua camps before the city. In wait. All is positioned.
The men lie in wait while Joshua camps before the city. In wait. All is positioned.
The men lie in wait while Joshua camps before the city. In wait. All is positioned.
The men lie in wait while Joshua camps before the city. In wait. All is positioned.
The king of Ai pursues, leaving the city open. Lured. Pride leads to ruin.
The king of Ai pursues, leaving the city open. Lured. Pride leads to ruin.
The king of Ai pursues, leaving the city open. Lured. Pride leads to ruin.
The king of Ai pursues, leaving the city open. Lured. Pride leads to ruin.
At God's word Joshua stretches his spear; the ambush takes the city. Seized. The signal is given.
At God's word Joshua stretches his spear; the ambush takes the city. Seized. The signal is given.
Ai's men are caught between two forces and slain. Trapped. The enemy is destroyed.
Ai's men are caught between two forces and slain. Trapped. The enemy is destroyed.
Ai's men are caught between two forces and slain. Trapped. The enemy is destroyed.
Ai's men are caught between two forces and slain. Trapped. The enemy is destroyed.
All Ai is smitten; Joshua holds out his spear till done. Smitten. The conquest is complete.
All Ai is smitten; Joshua holds out his spear till done. Smitten. The conquest is complete.
All Ai is smitten; Joshua holds out his spear till done. Smitten. The conquest is complete.
The spoil is kept; the king is hanged. Spoil. The city is left a heap.
The spoil is kept; the king is hanged. Spoil. The city is left a heap.
The spoil is kept; the king is hanged. Spoil. The city is left a heap.
Joshua builds an altar on Ebal and writes the law. The altar. Worship follows victory.
Joshua builds an altar on Ebal and writes the law. The altar. Worship follows victory.
Joshua builds an altar on Ebal and writes the law. The altar. Worship follows victory.
He reads all the law, blessings and curses, before all Israel. The reading. God's word is set before them.
He reads all the law, blessings and curses, before all Israel. The reading. God's word is set before them.
